title: Prepare J2CL interaction overlay metadata
summary: The opt-in J2CL selected-wave path now carries mention, task, and reaction metadata through its transport and projection layers so Lit interaction overlays can reach GWT parity in the follow-up UI slices.

items: Decoded selected-wave mention and task annotation ranges for the J2CL interaction overlay pipeline
Decoded per-blip reaction data documents and preserved reaction metadata across metadata-only selected-wave updates
